query: I'm about to train an XGBoost classifier on a binary task — credit-card default prediction, about 50k rows, 25 features, slight imbalance (positive rate around 0.18). What baselines should I add before reporting the XGBoost score?
expected_behavior: Recommends a Dummy / chance baseline (e.g. DummyClassifier with strategy='stratified' or 'most_frequent'), not just complex models
Recommends a linear baseline — LogisticRegression (or equivalent) — as the second rung of the ladder
States that the baselines must be fit and scored on the SAME train/test split (or same CV folds) and SAME metric the user plans to use for XGBoost — i.e. the evaluation regime is locked across models
